title: CaliFusion-CNN / MoRA: analysis code and research console for test-time per-modality reliability in multimodal clinical decision support
description: Code for Modality-Aware Reliability (MoRA): a label-free, test-time, per-modality reliability estimator that drives reliability-gated multimodal fusion and modality-attributed conformal abstention. Validated for clinically-significant prostate cancer detection on the public PI-CAI cohort (biparametric MRI + structured clinical variables); the repository also includes the NSCLC-Radiomics ("Lung1") imaging-redundancy and probability-calibration audit, and an authenticated FastAPI research console for running and visualizing the experiments. The repository ships code, configuration, and computed result metrics only; no patient imaging, marksheet, or derived embeddings are redistributed. Datasets must be obtained from their official sources.
